item.title: Pokémon Cards Used To Trap His Stepsister
item.description: Aidan Zellmer took his 10 year old stepsister Kiaya Campbell out to buy Pokémon cards but then murder her a a secluded area and brutally beat her to death with a metal pipe. Em x

media:content.media:title: Pokémon Cards Used To Trap His Stepsister
media:content.media:description: Aidan Zellmer took his 10 year old stepsister Kiaya Campbell out to buy Pokémon cards but then murder her a a secluded area and brutally beat her to death with a metal pipe. Em x

item.title: She Vanished on a Disney Cruise!
item.description: Rebecca Coriams parents are convinced that their daughter was pushed to her death after being violently attacked on board the Disney cruise ship she worked on. How can someone simply disappear at sea, and why did the CCTV footage that’s all over the ship mysteriously fail to record what happened to Rebecca? This case leaves more questions than answers, the biggest of which remains ‘did Disney cover up murder? Em xx

media:content.media:title: She Vanished on a Disney Cruise!
media:content.media:description: Rebecca Coriams parents are convinced that their daughter was pushed to her death after being violently attacked on board the Disney cruise ship she worked on. How can someone simply disappear at sea, and why did the CCTV footage that’s all over the ship mysteriously fail to record what happened to Rebecca? This case leaves more questions than answers, the biggest of which remains ‘did Disney cover up murder? Em xx
